name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-33
title: sync-check.py emits GREEN for surface drift but spec Inv 18 mandates RED for drift
description: hooks/sync-check.py line 124 emits surface drift message with ANSI green code (\x1b[32m): 'Surface drift detected — workspace rebuilt from sources'. Spec.md Inv 18 (Visual Styling section L391-395): 'drift detection (CLAUDE.md drift, skills drift, policy drift) and scope-guard-off messages are red; session-init, refresh, and skills-updated messages are green.' Surface drift is a drift case and should be red. test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG9-green-messages.py t3 ASSERTS green (assert_green_msg for SURFACE DRIFT) — so the test was authored against the buggy behavior. Either spec Inv 18 needs to clarify surface drift is green, or sync-check.py should change to red and the test inverted.

history.note: Wave 4 triage: duplicate of RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-34 (sync-check drift color), fixed by PR #114
